overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a futuristic neon-lit commercial plaza at night. The character traverses an elevated walkway, descends to a lower plaza with holographic advertisements and outdoor seating, then continues through a corridor with living walls toward an exterior exit.

approaching stairwell entrance to descend to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated walkway with glass railings, overlooking a neon-lit plaza below. The ceiling glows with cyan and purple light, while pink foliage and yellow umbrellas are visible on the lower level. NPCs stand by the railing observing the scene below.

segments.scene_description: The character descends stairs into the open plaza, transitioning from the sheltered walkway to an exposed area with wooden decking. Yellow umbrellas shade outdoor seating areas where NPCs sit at tables. A large red digital screen towers in the background, and the character navigates around the furniture.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the plaza, the character passes prominent digital billboards including the 'All Foods' advertisement and yellow vending machines. The area features benches for seating and walls covered in vertical gardens. An NPC in a white jacket walks past in the opposite direction as the character approaches a corridor entrance.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor with a glass ceiling and walls covered in living plants illuminated by purple neon lights. Metal benches line the walkway, and vending machines stand against the walls. Ahead, palm trees and natural light become visible through the corridor exit as the character approaches the exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit elevated walkway down into a bustling commercial plaza and through a lush, illuminated corridor toward the outdoors. It begins high above the plaza, moving past glass railings and NPCs under a glowing cyan and purple ceiling that overlooks pink foliage and yellow umbrellas below. As the character descends the stairs, the scene opens from the sheltered walkway into an exposed area of wooden decking and outdoor seating shaded by yellow umbrellas beneath a towering red digital screen. The camera then navigates through the plaza, passing All Foods billboards and yellow vending machines beside vertical gardens before turning into a narrow corridor. Finally, the environment shifts into a glass-ceilinged passage lined with purple-lit living walls and metal benches, moving steadily toward the natural light and palm trees visible at the exterior exit.
